snippet.sync_client:
from seed import SeedApi

client = SeedApi(
    token="YOUR_TOKEN",
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)
client.service.listresources(
    page=1,
    per_page=1,
    sort="sort",
    order="order",
    include_totals=True,
)
snippet.async_client:
import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi

client = AsyncSeedApi(
    token="YOUR_TOKEN",
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)


async def main() -> None:
    await client.service.listresources(
        page=1,
        per_page=1,
        sort="sort",
        order="order",
        include_totals=True,
    )


asyncio.run(main())
